title: ProgID
text: ProgID Name of the COM ProgID. Description The Programmatic ID (ProgID) is a string of the form Project.ClassName that provides an intelligible name for the CLSID number that uniquely identifies the COM object. Applies To Signature Implementation (COM) Related Links CLSID Internal class ID of the COM component. It is automatically provided when the ProgID is selected. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
